name: EVEZ666
description: AI cognitive platform with web search, code execution, market analysis, autonomous agents, and cognitive memory.
long_description: EVEZ is a self-evolving, never-halting cognitive architecture. Unlike ChatGPT, EVEZ is free, local-first, and fully open-source. It runs 24/7, documents every thought in a tamper-evident event spine, and can search the web, execute code, analyze markets, generate content, and broadcast its cognition live.
